3.happening: Count the elements so both loops know their bounds.
3.why: We'll pair each element with every later one.

4.happening: Fix an anchor element at index i.
4.why: We'll compare it against every element that comes after it.

5.happening: Pick a later element at index j to compare.
5.why: Only pairs with j after i are tested, so each pair is checked once.
5.invariant: j runs from i+1 to the end.

6.why: Two equal values anywhere in the array means a duplicate.

7.happening: They match — a duplicate pair, return true.
7.why: Two equal values exist in the array.

8.happening: No pair ever matched — return false.
8.why: Every element differs from all the others.

loop.why: Each anchor is compared to all later elements.

move.why: Only later elements are valid partners.

check.happening: Comparing the anchor with the current element.
check.why: We're hunting for two equal values.

done.happening: Found a matching pair — returning true.
